results.title: ChatGPT’s ‘smartest voice model ever’ is rolling out to everyone - today
results.description: OpenAI launched GPT-Live today — a full-duplex voice model that listens and speaks simultaneously, replacing ChatGPT Voice's turn-based system for 150 million weekly users.

results.title: Realme Narzo 100x 5G launching soon, First Glimpse Revealed in Teaser Showing a Large Battery
results.description: The launch of the Realme Narzo 100x 5G in India has been confirmed. A teaser has hinted at the phone's design and a large battery. Find out details about the launch.

results.title: Physical AI moves from demo floor to factory floor as robots face the real world
results.description: The key constraint is not investor enthusiasm. It is real-world data, battery life, edge chips, safety certification and the cost of deploying machines into messy industrial environments.

results.title: Edge AI Chip Market to Reach US$ 31.75 Billion by 2033 Driven by Rising Demand for Real-Time Processing, Expansion of IoT & Smart Devices, and Advancements in Low-Power AI Semiconductor Technologies
